meta_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing Projects: Solve 'No Project Ideas' for Students
content.seo_description: Overcome project paralysis with SaaS pricing modules. Learn how to build professional-grade billing systems using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the perfect idea. Build a SaaS pricing calculator or subscription toggle system. By mastering how to implement tiered pricing, you solve a critical business problem while building a high-value portfolio piece. Use Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for rapid iteration to launch your first functional module.
content.intro:
The screen glows in the dark, a silent testament to the 'empty repository' anxiety that plagues every developer. You have the skills, but the blank canvas of a new project feels like a mountain you aren't ready to climb. You aren't stuck because you lack talent; you are stuck because you lack a constraint.

SaaS pricing is the perfect crucible for your first project. It forces you to handle logic, state management, and user psychology simultaneously. It is not just a feature; it is the heartbeat of every successful application. Let's turn that anxiety into a concrete, deployable asset for your portfolio.

steps.title: Define the Value Tiers
steps.description: Before writing code, define the logic of your pricing. Map out 'Basic', 'Pro', and 'Enterprise' tiers with specific feature constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a JSON schema for a SaaS pricing model with three tiers, including boolean feature toggles and integer price points.

steps.title: Scaffold the UI Component
steps.description: Create a responsive pricing card component using Tailwind CSS to display your tiers visually.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component using Tailwind CSS for a 3-column pricing table with a toggle for monthly/yearly billing.

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Add logic to switch between billing cycles, ensuring the state updates correctly across the application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook to handle state switching between monthly and yearly pricing, applying a 20% discount to yearly plans.

steps.title: Integrate Mock Payment Logic
steps.description: Simulate the checkout process to understand how a user selects a plan and transitions to a payment gateway.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a mock checkout function that handles plan selection and returns a success response for a Stripe-like integration.

steps.title: Deploy and Portfolio Polish
steps.description: Finalize the codebase, clean up comments, and prepare the project for a live demo on your portfolio site.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the project for production readiness, adding prop-types and documentation comments to all functions.

pro_tips: Always build your pricing logic as a standalone service; it should never be hardcoded inside your UI components.
Use 'Price Anchoring' in your UI design—highlight the middle tier to guide user behavior toward your target revenue point.
Implement a 'Zero State' for your pricing module; if the data fails to load, the UI should gracefully fallback to a static display.
Focus on the 'Annual vs Monthly' toggle early; it is a common technical interview question regarding state synchronization.
Treat your pricing module as an API-first project; imagine the pricing data is coming from a database rather than a local file.
content.next_steps: Once you have your pricing module live, connect it to a real Stripe test key and deploy it to Vercel or Netlify to share your live link with potential employers.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop searching for ideas and start building the foundation of a real SaaS product. Don't let this knowledge sit in a tab—take the first step toward becoming a ship-ready developer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
